title: Agents for Service of Process and State Regulatory Authorities
why_it_matters: Lists registered agents and state regulatory contacts for franchise registration states.
key_burden_or_function: Compliance reference. No direct economic burden.

title: Franchise Application
why_it_matters: Required application form for individual franchisees. Application fee: $250/individual.
key_burden_or_function: Gateway document for franchise approval process.

title: Entity Franchise Application
why_it_matters: Required for entity applicants. Includes Managing Director Application and Owner Certification. Fee: up to $5,000.
key_burden_or_function: Entity ownership approval gateway. Includes sub-forms for Managing Director and Owner(s).

title: Target Reservation Agreement
why_it_matters: Defines Target Areas for site search. $5,000 deposit credited against franchise fee. Non-exclusive.
key_burden_or_function: Pre-commitment development agreement with deposit, site search authorization, and cure fee ($10,000) for missed schedules.

title: Multiple Target Reservation Agreement (Non-Exclusive)
why_it_matters: Multi-unit pre-commitment. $10,000 deposit per opening committed. Cure fee = remaining franchise fee x uncommitted restaurants.
key_burden_or_function: Multi-unit site search authorization with escalating penalties for missed development schedule.

title: Franchise Agreement (Individual/Owner-Operator)
why_it_matters: Core operative document for individual franchisees. 48 pages. Governs all rights, obligations, fees, territory, term, renewal, termination, transfer, noncompete.
key_burden_or_function: 20-year term, 4.5% royalty, 4.5% advertising, no exclusive territory, Florida forum, personal liability.

title: Franchise Agreement (Entity)
why_it_matters: Core operative document for entity franchisees. 42 pages. Requires Managing Owner (25%+ equity) and Guaranty.
key_burden_or_function: Same economics as D1 but with entity ownership structure, Managing Owner requirement, and Guaranty obligation.

title: Guaranty
why_it_matters: Required for entity franchisees. Owner(s) personally guarantee all Franchisee obligations to BKC.
key_burden_or_function: Full personal guaranty of entity obligations. Creates personal liability for entity owners.

title: Non-Traditional Facility Addendum (Individual/Owner-Operator)
why_it_matters: Modifies franchise agreement for non-traditional locations (in-line, food court, institutional, etc.). May have shorter term and different economics.
key_burden_or_function: Adjusts territory, term, fee, and operating obligations for non-traditional facility types.

title: Non-Traditional Facility Addendum (Entity)
why_it_matters: Entity version of non-traditional facility addendum.
key_burden_or_function: Same function as E1 but for entity franchise agreements.

title: Carrols Refranchise Term Sheet
why_it_matters: Term sheet for acquisition of Carrols restaurants. Requires 5% purchase price deposit (refundable within 30 days).
key_burden_or_function: Establishes deal terms for Carrols refranchise transactions including deposit, due diligence period, closing conditions.

title: Asset Purchase Agreement (Carrols Refranchise)
why_it_matters: 29-page APA for Carrols refranchise transactions. Governs asset transfer, representations, closing conditions.
key_burden_or_function: Acquisition vehicle for Carrols restaurants. No franchise fee, but tech installation fee up to $5,000/restaurant and $10,000/restaurant resale fee.

title: Carrols Refranchise Addendum
why_it_matters: Modifies franchise agreement terms for Carrols refranchise acquisitions.
key_burden_or_function: Addendum adjustments for restaurants acquired through Carrols program.

title: Lease/Sublease Agreement
why_it_matters: 41-page lease/sublease for BKC-controlled properties. Governs rent, maintenance, term, renewal, default for franchisees on BKC-leased sites.
key_burden_or_function: Rent is net of all taxes, CAM, insurance, expenses. Base rent monthly; percentage rent as agreed. Separate from franchise agreement obligations.

title: BKG Addendum to BKL Lease/Sublease
why_it_matters: Addendum modifying lease terms for Burger King Group properties.
key_burden_or_function: Adjusts lease terms for BKG-controlled locations.

title: Asset Purchase Agreement
why_it_matters: 34-page APA for purchasing existing BKC/affiliate-owned restaurants. Used for Crown Your Career and other acquisition transactions.
key_burden_or_function: Governs asset acquisition terms. Purchase price varies by location/condition. Includes representations, indemnification, closing conditions.

title: Successor Addendum (Individual/Owner-Operator)
why_it_matters: Terms for successor (renewal) franchise agreement. Required at term expiration.
key_burden_or_function: Successor franchise must sign then-current form (may have materially different terms). Remodel required.

title: Successor Addendum (Entity)
why_it_matters: Entity version of successor addendum.
key_burden_or_function: Same function as H1 for entity franchise agreements.

title: Successor Deferred Remodel Addendum
why_it_matters: Allows deferred remodel for successor franchise with penalty royalty rate if deadline missed.
key_burden_or_function: Royalty increases to 6.0% or 7.5% if deferred remodel not completed by deadline.

title: DMA Program Agreements (Investment Spending)
why_it_matters: Forms for DMA-level investment spending (up to 2.0% of Gross Sales). Multiple template variants.
key_burden_or_function: Collective advertising spending determined by DMA franchisees. Adds to base 4.5% advertising contribution.

title: Corporate Addendum to Franchise Agreement (Entity)
why_it_matters: For entities owned by other entities. Requires Managing Director appointment.
key_burden_or_function: Allows parent entity ownership with Managing Director oversight structure.

title: Legacy Entity Franchise Agreement Addendum
why_it_matters: For existing franchisees with legacy entity ownership structures.
key_burden_or_function: Transitional addendum for legacy entity structures.

title: Replacement Franchise Addendum
why_it_matters: For replacement franchise agreements in offset situations.
key_burden_or_function: Governs terms when a closed restaurant is replaced by a new one nearby.

title: Multi-Unit DIP 2024 Addendum to MTRA
why_it_matters: Governs 2024 Development Incentive Program with reduced royalties (2.5% Y1 stepping to 4.5% Y6+).
key_burden_or_function: Commit to 3-10 new restaurants in BKoT Image over 1-3 years for reduced royalties and advertising contributions.

title: Multi-Unit DIP 2017-2024 Addendum to Franchise Agreement
why_it_matters: Franchise agreement addendum implementing DIP royalty reductions for individual restaurants.
key_burden_or_function: Implements reduced royalty schedule at the franchise agreement level.

title: BKoT Full Remodel Incentive Franchise Agreement Addendum
why_it_matters: Prior program (no longer offered). BKoT full remodel incentives.
key_burden_or_function: Legacy program. Franchisees in program must comply with addendum terms.

title: BKoT Upgrade Incentive Franchise Agreement Addendum
why_it_matters: Prior program. BKoT upgrade incentives.
key_burden_or_function: Legacy program addendum.

title: BKoT Double Drive Thru & Digital Enhance Incentive FA Amendment
why_it_matters: Prior program. Double drive-thru and digital enhancement incentives.
key_burden_or_function: Legacy program amendment.

title: Development Agreement
why_it_matters: 24-page multi-unit Development Agreement. Commits to development schedule with prepaid franchise fees ($50,000/restaurant). FSS-graded royalty reductions.
key_burden_or_function: Multi-unit commitment with prepaid fees, development schedule, FSS-graded economics, Brand Damage Fee for early termination.

title: 2024 Developer Incentive Addendum
why_it_matters: Addendum to Development Agreement providing additional incentives for 2024 developers.
key_burden_or_function: Enhanced development incentives.

title: Reclaim the Flame Master Program Agreement
why_it_matters: 19-page original RTF program agreement. Remodel commitment with cash contribution from BKC and penalty royalty (+3.0%) for non-compliance.
key_burden_or_function: Remodel deadline commitment with BKC co-investment and severe penalty for missing deadlines.

title: RTF Upgrade Remodel Franchise Addendum
why_it_matters: Franchise agreement addendum for RTF upgrade remodels.
key_burden_or_function: Implements RTF remodel terms at the franchise agreement level.

title: List of Franchised Locations
why_it_matters: Complete list of U.S. franchised locations as of 12/31/2024 (5,524 restaurants). 62 pages.
key_burden_or_function: Franchisee contact information for prospective franchisee due diligence.

title: List of BKC-owned Locations
why_it_matters: Complete list of company-owned locations (1,177 restaurants). 22 pages. Includes Carrols-acquired locations.
key_burden_or_function: Reference for company-owned portfolio available for refranchising.

title: List of Franchisees that have Ceased Operations
why_it_matters: 1,433 franchisees who ceased operations in year ended 12/31/2024 or did not communicate within 10 weeks of issuance. 30 pages.
key_burden_or_function: Due diligence reference. Speech-limitation signal: some franchisees signed provisions restricting ability to speak openly.

title: Addenda and Amendments Required by Certain States
why_it_matters: 96 pages of state-specific overrides for 11 states affecting termination, noncompete, forum, governing law, nonrenewal, and other material provisions.
key_burden_or_function: State law overrides that may materially change franchise agreement terms depending on franchisee state.

title: Guarantees and Financial Statements
why_it_matters: 109 pages. Includes: RBI and RBILP audited consolidated financial statements (2022-2024), KPMG audit reports (unqualified), RBI Guarantee of Performance, RBILP Guarantee of Performance.
key_burden_or_function: RBI/RBILP guarantees BKC's duties under franchise agreements. Financial statements demonstrate parent's ability to support system.

title: Potential Franchise Sellers
why_it_matters: List of franchisees who may be willing to sell their franchise.
key_burden_or_function: Reference for prospective buyers seeking existing franchise opportunities.

title: Franchise Agreement Addendum (DIP)
why_it_matters: Prior Development Incentive Program addendum.
key_burden_or_function: Legacy program. Existing participants must comply.

title: Multi-Unit DIP 2017 Addendum
why_it_matters: Prior 2017 multi-unit DIP addendum.
key_burden_or_function: Legacy program addendum.

title: Offset/Replacement Franchise Addendum
why_it_matters: Prior program. Offset/replacement terms for closed-and-replaced restaurants.
key_burden_or_function: Legacy program addendum.

title: Remodel Franchise Addendum
why_it_matters: Prior program. Remodel incentive terms.
key_burden_or_function: Legacy program addendum.

title: Operations Manual Table of Contents
why_it_matters: 7 pages. Table of contents for Burger King Operations Manual US (dated February 14, 2025). Covers food safety, procedures, system basics, kitchen management, product preparation.
key_burden_or_function: Demonstrates scope of operational compliance requirements. Full manual not disclosed—only TOC.

title: Digital App Services Agreement
why_it_matters: 15 pages. Governs digital ordering, delivery, loyalty program, and mobile app services. Fee: $110/month + 1% digital sales (cap $4,500/year). Effective 1/1/2026.
key_burden_or_function: Technology, data access, platform integration burden. Required systems, suspension rights, compliance obligations, auto-debit mechanics. Significant operational dependency.

title: Midterm Remodel Forbearance Agreement
why_it_matters: 12 pages. Governs midterm remodel obligations with forbearance period. Penalty royalty (+3.0%) if remodel deadline missed.
key_burden_or_function: Remodel obligation with penalty escalation. BKC forbears enforcement of remodel requirement in exchange for commitment to complete by specified deadline.

title: Reclaim the Flame 2 Master Program Agreement
why_it_matters: 22 pages. RTF2 successor program. Remodel commitment with cash contribution from BKC based on FSS Remodel Grade, remodel type, and royalty rate elected. Penalty royalty (+3.0%) for non-compliance.
key_burden_or_function: Major remodel commitment. Franchisee elects royalty rate (4.5%-6.0%), receives cash contribution, must purchase additional term years to reach 20 total. Severe penalty for non-compliance.

title: Midterm Remodel Addendum to RTF2 MPA (No Midterm Remodel Pause)
why_it_matters: RTF2 addendum for restaurants without midterm remodel pause.
key_burden_or_function: No pause in remodel obligation.

title: Midterm Remodel Addendum to RTF2 MPA (Midterm Remodel Pause)
why_it_matters: RTF2 addendum for restaurants with midterm remodel pause option.
key_burden_or_function: Allows pause in midterm remodel obligation under specified conditions.

title: Fuel the Flame Co-Investment Agreement
why_it_matters: 10 pages. Co-investment program where BKC and franchisee share remodel/improvement costs. Connected to advertising contribution adjustments.
key_burden_or_function: Co-investment structure with shared funding for restaurant improvements. Linked to advertising contribution addenda.

title: Fuel the Flame Advertising Contribution Addendum
why_it_matters: Adjusts advertising contribution rates for Fuel the Flame program participants.
key_burden_or_function: Modified advertising contribution linked to Fuel the Flame participation.

title: Fuel the Flame/Legacy Rate Advertising Contribution Addendum
why_it_matters: For franchisees on legacy advertising rates entering Fuel the Flame program.
key_burden_or_function: Transitional advertising contribution for legacy-rate franchisees.

title: Crown Your Career Franchise Agreement Addendum (Entity)
why_it_matters: 6 pages. Entity addendum for Crown Your Career employee-to-franchisee program. May include higher royalty (1%-5% additional) if BKC pays for remodel.
key_burden_or_function: Modifies franchise terms for CYC program. BKC may charge higher royalty for remodel funding.

title: Crown Your Career Franchise Agreement Addendum (Individual/Owner-Operator)
why_it_matters: 5 pages. Individual version of CYC addendum.
key_burden_or_function: Same function as Z1 for individual franchise agreements.

title: Crown Your Career Promissory Note
why_it_matters: 8 pages. BKC-provided financing for Crown Your Career restaurant purchases. Late charge: 2% above Promissory Note interest rate.
key_burden_or_function: Franchisor-provided debt financing. Creates additional payment obligation and default risk beyond franchise fees.

title: Crown Your Career Security Agreement
why_it_matters: 19 pages. Security agreement for CYC promissory note. Creates security interest in restaurant assets to secure BKC loan.
key_burden_or_function: BKC takes security interest in all restaurant assets. Default under security agreement can trigger enforcement and asset seizure.
